title: Telemetry persistence: autonomous exercise
description: Reproduce the full telemetry scenario from Exercise A on your own. Build the image, deploy without storage, observe data loss, fix it with a PVC, and verify persistence.

steps.title: Build the image and import into containerd
Deploy without storage and simulate readings
Crash the Pod and observe data loss
Create the PVC and deploy with persistent storage
Simulate readings, crash, and verify persistence
